problem_text_cn: 3-21 小球A,B在光滑水平面上沿同一直线朝着对方运动，A球质量大于B球质量。已知碰前两球动能相同，碰后A球速度为零，B球速度不为零，试求A球质量与B球质量之比$\gamma$。
problem_text_en: 3-21 Two small balls A and B move towards each other along the same straight line on a smooth horizontal surface. Ball A has a greater mass than ball B. Before the collision, the two balls have equal kinetic energy. After the collision, ball A comes to rest while ball B continues to move. Find the mass ratio of ball A to ball B, $\gamma$.
problem_solution_cn:
解  A球碰前速率记为$v_{A0}$，B球碰前、碰后速率分别记为$v_{B0}$和$v_{B}$，B球质量记为$m$，A球质量便为$\gamma m$。
由动能相等，可得
$$
v_{B0}=\sqrt{\gamma}\cdot v_{A0} \quad \text{①}
$$
由动量守恒式$\gamma m v_{A0} - m v_{B0} = m v_{B}$，可得
$$
\gamma v_{A0} - v_{B0} = v_{B} \quad \text{②}
$$
碰后B球动能有如下限制
$$
\frac{1}{2}m v_{B}^{2}\leqslant 2\times\frac{1}{2}m v_{B0}^{2},
$$
又可得
$$
v_{B}\leqslant\sqrt{2}v_{B0} \quad \text{③}
$$
由②③式可得
$$
\gamma v_{A0}\leqslant(\sqrt{2}+1)v_{B0} \quad \text{④}
$$
将①式代入④，可得
$$
\gamma\leqslant(\sqrt{2}+1)^{2},
$$
据题设，$\gamma>1$，故$\gamma$的可能值为
$$
1<\gamma\leqslant(\sqrt{2}+1)^{2}.
$$
problem_solution_en:
Solution Let the velocity of ball A before collision be $v_{A0}$, and velocities of ball B before and after collision be $v_{B0}$ and $v_{B}$, respectively. Denote the mass of ball B as $m$; then the mass of ball A is $\gamma m$.
From equal kinetic energy, we have
$$
v_{B0}=\sqrt{\gamma}\cdot v_{A0} \quad \text{①}
$$
From momentum conservation, $\gamma m v_{A0} - m v_{B0} = m v_{B}$, we obtain
$$
\gamma v_{A0} - v_{B0} = v_{B} \quad \text{②}
$$
The kinetic energy of ball B after collision is limited by
$$
\frac{1}{2}m v_{B}^{2}\leqslant 2\times\frac{1}{2}m v_{B0}^{2},
$$
hence
$$
v_{B}\leqslant\sqrt{2}v_{B0} \quad \text{③}
$$
From ② and ③, we get
$$
\gamma v_{A0}\leqslant(\sqrt{2}+1)v_{B0} \quad \text{④}
$$
Substituting ① into ④ yields
$$
\gamma\leqslant(\sqrt{2}+1)^{2}.
$$
According to the problem, $\gamma>1$; therefore the possible values of $\gamma$ are
$$
1<\gamma\leqslant(\sqrt{2}+1)^{2}.
$$

img_en: The image is a physics problem, number 3-21, about a head‑on collision of two small balls on a smooth horizontal surface. It contains the Chinese problem statement, physical formulas (e.g., $v_{B0}=\sqrt{\gamma}\cdot v_{A0}$), derivation steps, and the final conclusion.
